title: Ender crystal but Caine's eyes
description: This project turn the normal ender crystal to a version of Caine's eyes.
body: This project turn the normal ender crystal to a version of Caine's eyes its cool for persons aficioned with this show (i was bored and without ideas, i just wanna make some more resource packs but i dont have more ideas so if you guys have one tell me please but dont make it hard)
